query:
SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN abridged IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
                WHEN abridged = 0    THEN 'unabridged'
                WHEN abridged = 1    THEN 'abridged'
                ELSE 'unknown'
            END AS "bucket_label!: String",
            COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64",
            COALESCE(SUM(duration_ms), 0) AS "hours_ms!: i64"
         FROM books
         WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
         GROUP BY 1
         ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
